provenance.emptyPrefix: No versions recorded yet. Each time the agent writes
provenance.emptySuffix: , a version is added here with the code, model, and conversation that produced it.
provenance.envTitle: Environment this version was produced in
provenance.lockfileTitle: View the captured pip freeze lockfile for this version
provenance.reproduceRunTitle: Draft a prompt that re-runs this file's run and compares the outputs
provenance.reproduceVersionTitle: Draft a prompt that re-runs this version's code and compares the result
provenance.openConversationTitle: Open the conversation this version came from
provenance.openRunTitle: Open this run in the Runs view
provenance.producedByRunSuffix: . This file is an output of running code; Reproduce re-runs that command and compares the result.
provenance.contentNotCaptured: Content not captured for this version (a binary write, or an edit that recorded only a diff).

filePreview.historyTitle: History — every recorded version with its code and conversation
filePreview.desktopOnly: Preview is available in the desktop app.
filePreview.sourceDesktopOnly: Source is available in the desktop app.
filePreview.binaryNoPreview: This file is binary and has no preview — open it externally.
filePreview.tooLargeBody: Previews are capped so a large file can't freeze the app. Inspect it without loading — the large-file probe reads its schema, shape, a sample, and key numbers by streaming, never loading the whole file — or open it in your system app.
